hooks.command:
node -e "try{const f=require('fs').readFileSync('MEMORY_PATH_PLACEHOLDER/MEMORY.md','utf8');console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:'## Memory Index (loaded on SessionStart)

'+f.trim()+'

Memory loaded. To read a full domain, use the Read tool on the corresponding path.'}}))}catch(e){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:'Memory index not found. Run the install script to set up Synthius-Mem.'}}))}" 2>/dev/null || true

node -e "try{const fs=require('fs'),path='MEMORY_PATH_PLACEHOLDER/.pending',files=fs.existsSync(path)?fs.readdirSync(path).filter(f=>f.startsWith('pending-')):[];if(files.length>0){let log='';files.forEach(f=>{const c=fs.readFileSync(path+'/'+f,'utf8');const m=c.match(/^---[\s\S]*?---/);const domain=(m&&m[0].match(/domain:\s*(\S+)/))?m[0].match(/domain:\s*(\S+)/)[1]:'unknown';log+='[SessionEnd] '+f+' -> '+domain+'
'});fs.appendFileSync('MEMORY_PATH_PLACEHOLDER/consolidation-log.md','
## SessionEnd '+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'

Pending entries:
'+log);fs.writeFileSync(path+'/_last-consolidation.json',JSON.stringify({time:new Date().toISOString(),pendingFiles:files}),'utf8')}else{console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'No pending memory entries to consolidate.'}))}}catch(e){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Memory consolidation check skipped: '+e.message}))}" 2>/dev/null || true
